name: Replay Saver
description: Automatically records and saves replays. Supports optional MP4 export after completing a level.

auto-export-mp4.name: Auto Export MP4
auto-export-mp4.description: Automatically export replay as MP4 after level completion.

save-replay-data.name: Save Replay Data
save-replay-data.description: Save .replay files for playback and ghost mode.
